_comment: outlook theme (Horizontal Scroll Presentation) — all slides in a horizontal scroll track with CSS scroll-snap and IntersectionObserver-based active-slide tracking. Inspired by corporate/keynote dark-mode aesthetics with gold accents, badge system, stat cards, and three-tier text hierarchy. Uses ppt-engine.js for shared TOC, transitions, narration, fullscreen, and timer. v1.0.0: initial release.
name: outlook
description: Horizontal scroll presentation theme with corporate dark-mode aesthetic. All slides laid out in a horizontal track with CSS scroll-snap and IntersectionObserver tracking. Features a 3px gold progress bar, TOC overlay panel, and PPT-style footer controls. Designed for visual, data-driven presentations with badge systems, stat cards, and rich typography hierarchy. Ideal for business strategy, corporate briefings, and keynote-style content.

rendering.navigation: TOC overlay panel + footer bar — prev/next, transition mode selector, script toggle, timer, TTS controls, auto-play
rendering.progress_indicator: progress bar (top, 3px gold accent) + slide counter + IntersectionObserver active tracking

content_rules.notes: Horizontal scroll suits data-rich, visually driven presentations. Titles up to 40 chars. Max 8 bullets per slide. All slide types supported including cover with gradient background, divider with act-number watermark, and standard slides with cards/grids/badges. Mouse wheel converted to horizontal scroll. Keyboard: ArrowLeft/Right, PageUp/PageDown, Home/End, Space, F (fullscreen), T (TOC).

recommended_structure.pattern: Cover → Speaker Intro → [Hook] × N → [Act Divider → 6-12 Content → Act Closing] × N → Call to Action → Thank You
recommended_structure.notes: Optimized for corporate/consulting presentations with narrative arc structure. Three-act storytelling pattern. Each act has a divider with gradient background. Supports rich visual elements: inline SVGs, stat cards, badge indicators, grid layouts, and data tables.

author: co-deck
